top_signals.title: Russia’s Gasoline Crunch Spreads After Refinery Attacks
top_signals.summary: Russia’s gasoline crunch is worsening, with at least two-thirds of the country’s regions introducing fuel rationing or suffering supply disruptions following relentless Ukrainian drone attacks on refineries.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Russia Considers Diesel-Export Ban on Ukraine Refinery Attacks
top_signals.summary: Russia is weighing a ban on exports of diesel to avoid domestic shortages after Ukraine intensified attacks on the nation’s refineries.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
